title: HCA Healthcare, Inc. to Present at February and March Healthcare Conferences
text: NASHVILLE, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) is scheduled to present virtually at following healthcare conferences: February 16, 2022 at 10:40 am EST at the SVB Leerink 11th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. March 9, 2022 at 11:10 am EST at the Cowen 42nd Annual Health Care Conference. March 15, 2022 at 10:00 am EDT at the Oppenheimer 32nd Annual Healthcare Conference. A link to the live audio webcast, where applicable, and copies of any related presentation materials will be made available at the Investor Relations section of the Company’s website, www.hcahealthcare.com. Dates and times may be subject to change, please check the conference schedule or the Investor Relations section of the Company’s website for the latest information. All references to “Company” and “HCA” as used throughout this release refer to HCA Healthcare, Inc. and its affiliates.

title: HCA Healthcare: Still An Excellent Opportunity
text: HCA Healthcare has demonstrated itself to be a best-of-breed company in recent years. The company continues to trade at low multiples that make it a compelling opportunity long term.
